title: Proclamation No. 810, s. 1991
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 810

RESERVING FOR ZAMBOANGA CITY GOVERNMENT CENTER SITE PURPOSES A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE POBLACION, CITY OF ZAMBOANGA, ISLAND OF MINDANAO

Upon recommendation of the Secretary of Environment and Natural Resources, and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, CORAZON C. AQUINO, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale, entry, disposition or settlement and reserve for the Zamboanga City Government Center site purposes a certain parcel of land of the public domain situated in the Poblacion, City of Zamboanga, and which is more particularly described as follows:

A parcel of land of the Municipal Reservation, MR-09-000015, situated in the Poblacion, City of Zamboanga, Island of Mindanao. Bounded on the NE., line 1-2 by Lot 5, El Barato Bazar, Cad. 14, on line 2-3 by Lot 4-A, Cad. 14, Lim Hua, et al., on line 3-4 by Lot 4-B, Cad. 14, Huy Lian Development Inc., on line 4-5 by Lot 3, Cad. 14, Interco; on the SW., line 5-6 by Mercado Street (8.00 m. wide), on the SW. lines 6-7-8 on the W., line 8-9 both of Mercado Extension Street (8.00 m. wide), on the NW., lines 9-10-11-1 by Gov. Lim Avenue (8.00 m. wide). Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan being S. 58° 24′ W., 24.66 m. from Mon. No. 30, Cad. 14, thence. .

S. 03° 01′ E., 24.57 m. to point 2; S. 10° 54′ E., 10.93 m. to point 3; S. 10° 54′ E., 25.43 m. to point 4; S. 03° 07′ W., 13.42 m. to point 5; N. 77° 40′ W., 22.66 m. to point 6; N. 56° 09′ W., 1.02 m. to point 7; N. 13° 17′ W., 1.30 m. to point 8; N. 04° 45′ E., 61.70 m. to point 9; N. 24° 15′ E., 1.44 m. to point 10; N. 52° 42′ E., 1.32 m. to point 11; N. 69° 44′ E., 9.70 m. to point of

beginning, containing an area of ONE THOUSAND ONE HUNDRED NINETY ONE (1,191) SQUARE METERS. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground as follows: Points 1 to 5 by Old PS and the rest by BL cyl. conc. mon. 15 x 60 cms., bearing true; date of survey, October 9, 1989 executed by Engr. Benjamin K. Lualhati, and approved on January 4, 1990.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 7th day of October, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and ninety one.

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

By the President: (Sgd.) FRANKLIN M. DRILON Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
